description: 10-generation allocator optimization targeting decoy_300 cost ratio and saturation_1000 leaker count

applied_changes.change: Area confidence gate: skip low-confidence targets (< 0.3) from area coverage when effector is expensive
applied_changes.impact: Neutral. Defensive guard that prevents future regressions.
Neutral on current scenarios. Deprioritizes uncertain targets in point phase.

applied_changes.change: Area reload acceleration: 1.6x factor for area effectors
applied_changes.impact: REGRESSION. Leakers up in both targets. Reverted.

applied_changes.change: Capacity conservation: block distant threats when defender capacity <= 2
applied_changes.impact: Neutral. Defensive guard for ammo-starved defenders.

applied_changes.change: Area min coverage lowered from 3 to 2
applied_changes.impact: Mixed. Sat -24 leakers but decoy +11 leakers. Replaced by Gen 6.

applied_changes.change: Dynamic area coverage threshold: min_cov=2 when live_count > 600, else 3
applied_changes.impact: IMPROVEMENT. Sat_1000: -24 leakers. No regression on other scenarios.
Neutral. No measurable change but correct directionally.

applied_changes.change: SATURATION overspend cap raised from 8x to 20x
applied_changes.impact: REGRESSION. Cost ratio improved but leakers up +63. Reverted.

applied_changes.change: Cost ratio ceiling lowered from 0.15 to 0.10
applied_changes.impact: IMPROVEMENT. Decoy cost ratio: 0.16 -> 0.11 (32% better). Defender spend saved $8k.

analysis.saturation_1000_bottleneck: All 10 area effectors (5 HPM + 5 EW) fully depleted. 230 area shots fired, average 1.7 targets per shot, 24% miss rate. Leaker count is capacity-limited.
analysis.decoy_300_improvement: Cost ratio improved 32% by tightening the dynamic cost ceiling from 0.15 to 0.10. Interceptor spending cut from $24.7k to $16.7k with no change in kill count.
analysis.area_miss_analysis: 55 out of 230 area shots hit 0 targets due to position uncertainty between allocation and kill resolution. Improving fusion accuracy would reduce this.
analysis.key_insight: In saturation, area effector capacity is the binding constraint. Adding more HPM/EW units or increasing max_simultaneous would reduce leakers more than any allocator optimization.
